title: My Domains
description: Manage and verify your domains for the Octara ecosystem.

add.title: Add a domain
add.hint: Enter the bare domain name (without http:// or https://)

how_to.title: How to verify my domain?
how_to.description: Once added, click "Verify". You will need to add a specific DNS TXT record to confirm that you are the owner of the domain.

modal.title: Verify {domain}
modal.description: Configure your DNS records to validate ownership
modal.warning: DNS propagation can take from 2 to 24 hours.

details.title: Details: {domain}
details.description: Manage your subdomains for this domain

index.loading_desc: We are fetching the structure of {host}
index.title: Site Structure
index.no_pages: No pages found for this domain in the index.

sitemap.hint: Press the button to try fetching the site's XML sitemap.

delete_modal.title: Delete {subdomain}?
delete_modal.description: Choose how you want to handle the data associated with this subdomain. This operation is irreversible.
delete_modal.full_clean_desc: Deletes the domain AND dereferences all its pages from the index.
delete_modal.simple_remove_desc: Removes the domain from your list only. The index remains unchanged.

notifications.recrawl_error: Failed to launch recrawl. Try again later.
notifications.delete_page_confirm:
Do you really want to delete this page from the search index?

{url}
